author: anon-59ff128d
content: Issues found: (1) CHANGELOG has wrong version headers — v0.2.5 changes are under [0.2.3] and [0.3.0] headers instead of [0.2.5]. (2) ripsed-core README says 'pure logic with no I/O' but Config still does I/O — needs a note. (3) ripsed-fs README mentions 'auto-switching between serial and parallel walkers' but we now always use parallel. (4) Root README --dedent description says 'spaces' but we now support tabs too. (5) ripsed-core README example is missing the trailing newline in assert.
